name: Edictum Contract Enforcement
description: Runtime contract enforcement for AI agent tool calls. Denies exfiltration, credential theft, destructive commands, and prompt injection.

contractsPath.label: Contracts Path
contractsPath.help: Path to a custom YAML contract bundle (defaults to the bundled openclaw-governance.yaml)

mode.label: Enforcement Mode
mode.help: "enforce" blocks violations; "observe" logs them without blocking

serverUrl.label: Console Server URL
serverUrl.help: Edictum Console URL for HITL approvals and audit feeds (optional)

apiKey.label: Console API Key
apiKey.help: API key for connecting to Edictum Console (optional)

agentId.label: Agent ID
agentId.help: Stable agent identifier for Console fleet monitoring (optional)
